title: Block Explorer Lite
description: Full-featured mini block explorer for any EVM chain — search by block, transaction hash, or wallet address, with decoded event logs and internal transfers.
useCase: Build a white-label block explorer page for any EVM chain that lets users search transactions by hash, browse blocks, and see decoded event logs — like a chain-specific Etherscan.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain name — e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet
keyParams.query: Search input — transaction hash (0x...), block number (integer), or wallet address (0x...)
